phoneme-align.name: Phoneme Forced Alignment
phoneme-align.description:
Word-level timestamp alignment using CTC forced alignment with
wav2vec2 models. Standalone reimplementation of the phoneme alignment
algorithm from the WhisperX paper (Bain et al., INTERSPEECH 2023).

Does not depend on the whisperx package. Uses torchaudio pipeline
models for major European languages and HuggingFace wav2vec2 models
for 35+ additional languages.

pii-presidio.name: PII Detection (GLiNER + Presidio checksum)
pii-presidio.description:
Detects personally identifiable information using GLiNER (zero-shot NER)
as the primary detector, supplemented by Presidio for checksum-validated
patterns (credit cards via Luhn, IBANs via mod-97).

nemo-msdd.name: NeMo MSDD Speaker Diarization
nemo-msdd.description:
Speaker diarization using NVIDIA NeMo Multi-scale Diarization Decoder.
Neural end-to-end system with built-in overlap detection.

No HuggingFace token required - models are open under CC-BY-4.0 license.
Supports optional min/max speaker count hints.
CPU inference supported but slow (~2x realtime).

pyannote-4.0.name: Pyannote Speaker Diarization 4.0
pyannote-4.0.description:
Speaker diarization using pyannote-audio 4.0 with the new Community-1 pipeline.
Identifies who speaks when in an audio file.

New in 4.0:
  - VBx clustering for improved speaker counting and assignment
  - Exclusive mode for single-speaker segments (better Whisper alignment)
  - NumPy 2.0 and modern dependency compatibility

Requires HuggingFace token (HF_TOKEN) for accessing gated models.
Supports optional min/max speaker count hints for improved accuracy.

final-merger.name: Final Merger
final-merger.description:
Combines outputs from upstream pipeline stages into the
standard Dalston transcript format.

Adds segment IDs, metadata, and writes the canonical
transcript.json file for the Gateway to read.

For per_channel mode with PII detection and audio redaction:
- Collects and merges PII entities from each channel
- Assembles redacted mono WAVs into stereo output (FFmpeg)

audio-prepare.name: Audio Prepare
audio-prepare.description:
Converts any audio format to 16kHz, 16-bit, mono WAV.
Extracts duration and audio metadata using ffprobe.
Required as the first stage of all batch pipelines.

audio-redactor.name: Audio Redaction (FFmpeg)
audio-redactor.description:
Redacts audio by replacing PII segments with silence or beep tones.
Uses FFmpeg for efficient single-pass processing. Requires PII detection
output with entity timing information.

faster-whisper.name: Faster Whisper Runtime
faster-whisper.description:
Runtime engine for faster-whisper (CTranslate2-based Whisper) transcription.
Can load any Whisper-compatible model at runtime via runtime_model_id.

M36: This is a runtime-level configuration. The engine loads specific model
variants on demand, without requiring separate Docker images per variant.
See models/*.yaml for pre-defined model variants.

hf-asr.name: HuggingFace Transformers ASR
hf-asr.description:
Generic ASR engine for HuggingFace Transformers models.
Supports Whisper, Wav2Vec2, HuBERT, MMS, and other ASR architectures
with pipeline_tag=automatic-speech-recognition.

Use for community fine-tunes and research models. Any of the 10,000+
ASR models on HuggingFace Hub can be loaded at runtime via runtime_model_id.

nemo.name: NVIDIA NeMo Parakeet Runtime
nemo.description:
Runtime engine for NVIDIA NeMo Parakeet transcription models.
Can load any Parakeet model at runtime via runtime_model_id.

M36: This is a runtime-level configuration. The engine loads specific model
variants on demand, without requiring separate Docker images per variant.
See models/*.yaml for pre-defined model variants.

All Parakeet models produce native word-level timestamps without needing
a separate alignment stage.

nemo-onnx.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX Runtime
nemo-onnx.description:
Lightweight ONNX Runtime engine for NVIDIA Parakeet transcription models.
Uses the onnx-asr library for fast inference without the full NeMo toolkit.
Supports CTC, TDT, and RNNT decoders.

M41: This runtime provides the same Parakeet model accuracy with significantly
smaller container images (~1GB vs ~12GB) and faster startup. Uses ONNX Runtime
for inference and supports both CPU and GPU execution.

Supported models:
  - nvidia/parakeet-ctc-0.6b (CTC, fast, 600M params)
  - nvidia/parakeet-ctc-1.1b (CTC, accurate, 1.1B params)
  - nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2 (TDT, English-only, 600M params)
  - nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 (TDT, punctuation + capitalization, 600M params)
  - nvidia/parakeet-rnnt-0.6b (RNNT, English-only, 600M params)

All models produce native word-level timestamps without needing a separate
alignment stage.

vllm-asr.name: vLLM Audio ASR
vllm-asr.description:
Audio-capable LLMs via vLLM for high-accuracy transcription.
Supports Voxtral (Mistral) and Qwen2-Audio model families.

Uses model-specific adapters for prompt building and output parsing.
Loads models at runtime via runtime_model_id without requiring
separate Docker images per variant.

Note: Audio LLMs produce text only - no word timestamps.
Use the alignment stage (phoneme-align) if word-level timing is needed.

Systran/faster-whisper-base.name: Faster Whisper Base
Systran/faster-whisper-base.description:
OpenAI Whisper base model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Good balance of speed and accuracy for general transcription.
Supports 99 languages with automatic language detection.

Systran/faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo.name: Faster Whisper Large V3 Turbo
Systran/faster-whisper-large-v3-turbo.description:
OpenAI Whisper large-v3-turbo model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Optimized for speed while maintaining high accuracy.
Distilled from large-v3 with pruned decoder for faster inference.
Supports 99 languages with automatic language detection.
Default model for Dalston - good balance of speed, accuracy, and compatibility.

Systran/faster-whisper-large-v3.name: Faster Whisper Large V3
Systran/faster-whisper-large-v3.description:
OpenAI Whisper large-v3 model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Best accuracy for multilingual transcription.
Supports 99 languages with automatic language detection.

Systran/faster-whisper-medium.name: Faster Whisper Medium
Systran/faster-whisper-medium.description:
OpenAI Whisper medium model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Good accuracy with moderate resource requirements.
Supports 99 languages with automatic language detection.

Systran/faster-whisper-small.name: Faster Whisper Small
Systran/faster-whisper-small.description:
OpenAI Whisper small model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Good balance of speed and accuracy for resource-constrained environments.
Supports 99 languages with automatic language detection.

Systran/faster-whisper-tiny.name: Faster Whisper Tiny
Systran/faster-whisper-tiny.description:
OpenAI Whisper tiny model via faster-whisper (CTranslate2).
Smallest and fastest model, ideal for real-time or resource-constrained environments.
Lower accuracy than larger models. Supports 99 languages.

nvidia/parakeet-ctc-0.6b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet CTC 0.6B
nvidia/parakeet-ctc-0.6b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet FastConformer CTC 0.6B for fast English-only transcription.
CTC decoder provides fastest inference with greedy decoding.
Produces native word-level timestamps without separate alignment.
Best choice for high-throughput batch processing.

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation. Use refine stage or
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 if punctuation/capitalization is required.

nvidia/parakeet-ctc-1.1b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet CTC 1.1B
nvidia/parakeet-ctc-1.1b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet FastConformer CTC 1.1B for fast English-only transcription.
CTC decoder provides fastest inference with greedy decoding.
Larger model with better accuracy than 0.6B variant.
Best choice for high-throughput batch processing with quality.

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation. Use refine stage or
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 if punctuation/capitalization is required.

parakeet-onnx-ctc-0.6b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX CTC 0.6B
parakeet-onnx-ctc-0.6b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet CTC 0.6B via ONNX Runtime for fast English-only transcription.
Same model accuracy as the NeMo variant (parakeet-ctc-0.6b) but runs on
ONNX Runtime for lighter deployment and better CPU performance.

Advantages over NeMo variant:
  - ~12x smaller container image (~1GB vs ~12GB)
  - ~3x faster cold start
  - Better CPU inference (ONNX optimizations + INT8 quantization)
  - No PyTorch dependency for CPU inference

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation.

parakeet-onnx-ctc-1.1b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX CTC 1.1B
parakeet-onnx-ctc-1.1b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet CTC 1.1B via ONNX Runtime for accurate English-only transcription.
Larger model with better accuracy than the 0.6B variant.
Same accuracy as the NeMo variant (parakeet-ctc-1.1b) but runs on ONNX Runtime.

Advantages over NeMo variant:
  - ~12x smaller container image (~1GB vs ~12GB)
  - ~3x faster cold start
  - Better CPU inference (ONNX optimizations + INT8 quantization)
  - No PyTorch dependency for CPU inference

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation.

parakeet-onnx-rnnt-0.6b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX RNNT 0.6B
parakeet-onnx-rnnt-0.6b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet RNNT 0.6B via ONNX Runtime for accurate English-only
transcription. RNN-Transducer decoder provides streaming-quality accuracy
in a lightweight ONNX package.

Same model accuracy as the NeMo variant but runs on ONNX Runtime for
lighter deployment and better CPU performance.

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation.

parakeet-onnx-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX TDT 0.6B v2
parakeet-onnx-tdt-0.6b-v2.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 0.6B v2 via ONNX Runtime for accurate English-only
transcription. TDT (Token-and-Duration Transducer) provides better accuracy
than CTC while maintaining fast inference.

Same model accuracy as the NeMo variant but runs on ONNX Runtime for
lighter deployment and better CPU performance.

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation.

parakeet-onnx-tdt-0.6b-v3.name: NVIDIA Parakeet ONNX TDT 0.6B v3
parakeet-onnx-tdt-0.6b-v3.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3 via ONNX Runtime for accurate English-only
transcription with automatic punctuation and capitalization.
TDT (Token-and-Duration Transducer) provides best accuracy among 0.6B models.
64% faster than RNNT while achieving lower WER.

Same model accuracy as the NeMo variant but runs on ONNX Runtime for
lighter deployment and better CPU performance.

nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.name: NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3
nvidia/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet FastConformer TDT 0.6B v3 for accurate English-only transcription.
TDT (Token-and-Duration Transducer) provides best-in-class accuracy.
64% faster than RNNT while achieving lower WER.
Produces native word-level timestamps without separate alignment.

NOTE: v3 includes automatic punctuation and capitalization.

nvidia/parakeet-tdt-1.1b.name: NVIDIA Parakeet TDT 1.1B
nvidia/parakeet-tdt-1.1b.description:
NVIDIA Parakeet FastConformer TDT 1.1B for highest accuracy English transcription.
TDT (Token-and-Duration Transducer) achieves state-of-the-art WER scores.
First model to achieve <7.0% average WER on HuggingFace Open ASR leaderboard.
Best choice when transcription accuracy is the priority.

NOTE: Outputs lowercase text without punctuation. Use refine stage or
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 if punctuation/capitalization is required.

vllm-asr-qwen2-audio-7b.name: Qwen2-Audio 7B Instruct (vLLM)
vllm-asr-qwen2-audio-7b.description:
Alibaba Qwen2-Audio 7B served via vLLM for multilingual transcription.
Supports a wide range of languages with strong multilingual capabilities.

Qwen2-Audio is a multimodal audio-language model capable of both
transcription and audio understanding tasks. When used with Dalston,
it operates as a high-accuracy transcription engine.

Note: Produces text only without word-level timestamps.
Chain with phoneme-align stage if timestamps are needed.

vllm-asr-voxtral-mini-3b.name: Voxtral Mini 3B (vLLM)
vllm-asr-voxtral-mini-3b.description:
Mistral Voxtral Mini 3B served via vLLM for multilingual transcription.
Supports 8 languages with high accuracy. Uses vLLM's optimized serving
for efficient GPU utilization and batched inference.

Note: Produces text only without word-level timestamps.
Chain with phoneme-align stage if timestamps are needed.

vllm-asr-voxtral-small-24b.name: Voxtral Small 24B (vLLM)
vllm-asr-voxtral-small-24b.description:
Mistral Voxtral Small 24B served via vLLM for highest accuracy
multilingual transcription. Larger model with better accuracy than
Mini 3B but requires significantly more GPU memory.

Supports 8 languages. Use for production workloads where accuracy
is the primary concern and large GPU instances are available.

Note: Produces text only without word-level timestamps.
Chain with phoneme-align stage if timestamps are needed.

phoneme-align.name: Phoneme Forced Alignment
phoneme-align.description:
Word-level timestamp alignment using CTC forced alignment with
wav2vec2 models. Standalone reimplementation of the phoneme alignment
algorithm from the WhisperX paper (Bain et al., INTERSPEECH 2023).

Does not depend on the whisperx package. Uses torchaudio pipeline

See models/*.yaml for pre-defined model variants.
